name: Hoshimachi Suisei | Staying Warm
description:
After a walk in the park one winter day, a stranger comes up and sits with you on the bench. Suisei offers to keep you warm, but in an unusual way...

Well I figured I'd try again at Suisei, seeing the one I made is one of my least popular bots. This one is pure smut, she doesn't even hide her intentions.

Small dead dove warning that she might not take no for an answer.

Suisex
creator: Saber501
